title: KK Wind Solutions Signs Framework Agreement With Stiesdal Hydrogen for Groundbreaking Plant Concept
content:
KK Wind Solutions has signed a framework agreement with Stiesdal Hydrogen to supply advanced power and control technologies for Stiesdalâ€™s next-generation green hydrogen plant concept. The collaboration builds on their partnership since 2021, combining KK Wind Solutionsâ€™ expertise in power conversion and control systems with Stiesdalâ€™s scalable electrolyser technology.

Under the agreement, KK Wind Solutions will provide Power Supply Units (PSU) and Electrolyser Control Systems tailored to manage dynamic renewable inputs, ensuring maximum efficiency and reliability in hydrogen production. The standardized 3.1 MW electrolyser modules can be scaled up to over 12.4 MW, enabling flexible expansion for green hydrogen facilities. The plant concept aims to achieve capital expenditure below EUR 1,000 per kilowatt, significantly lowering costs compared to current market levels.

The project also integrates thermal management technologies from Nissens Cooling Solutions, part of KK Wind Solutions, enhancing safety and performance. Together, these innovations represent a major step toward affordable, efficient, and large-scale green hydrogen production in Europe, advancing the transition to clean energy.
author: Analysts Account
